title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Charak Pharma - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Charak Pharma - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Charak Pharma has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Noida office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Charak Pharma:
Charak Pharma is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Charak Pharma!
